summary: Tested the Proposed SKU Pricing section modifications on the Lead Detail page. All 10 features are working correctly including percentage-based volume distribution, auto-calculated quantities and revenue, total row validation, and the Estimated Monthly Opportunity display.
seed_data_creation: Used existing Taj Sarees lead with opportunity estimation of 75,000 bottles/month
context_for_next_testing_agent: SKU Pricing feature fully tested on Lead Detail page. Key data-testid selectors: proposed-sku-pricing-card, estimated-monthly-opportunity, edit-pricing-btn, save-pricing-btn, cancel-pricing-btn, add-proposed-sku-btn, proposed-percentage-input-{index}, proposed-price-input-{index}, remove-proposed-sku-{index}. Calculations verified: 60% allocation of 75,000 bottles = 45,000 units × ₹58 = ₹26,10,000 for 330ml SKU; 40% × 75,000 = 30,000 × ₹94 = ₹28,20,000 for 660ml SKU; Total = ₹54,30,000.

proposed_sku_pricing_card.details: Card displays correctly on Lead Detail page with proper layout and data-testid attribute

estimated_monthly_opportunity_display.details: Shows prominently at top in green gradient background. Value: ₹54,30,000 with '75,000 bottles/month' and '100% allocated' indicators

percentage_distribution_input.details: % Dist. input column works correctly in edit mode. Input fields accept numeric values with data-testid='proposed-percentage-input-{index}'

estimated_qty_auto_calculation.details: Est. Qty auto-calculates as (monthly bottles × percentage / 100). Example: 75,000 × 60% = 45,000

revenue_auto_calculation.details: Revenue auto-calculates as (Est. Qty × Price/Unit). Example: 45,000 × ₹58 = ₹26,10,000

total_row_aggregation.details: Total row shows sum of percentages, quantities, and revenue. Total: 100%, 75,000, ₹54,30,000

percentage_exceeds_100_warning.details: When total percentage > 100%, shows '(exceeds 100%!)' in red text. Total percentage shows in red color class

no_opportunity_estimation_warning.details: When lead has no opportunity estimation (0 bottles), shows amber warning: 'Complete the Opportunity Estimation to see revenue calculations'

save_functionality.details: Save button persists SKU pricing including percentage field. Toast 'Proposed SKU pricing saved' appears on success

add_remove_sku_buttons.details: Add SKU button adds new row with 'Select SKU' dropdown. Remove SKU button (trash icon) removes the row. Both work correctly
